sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - LUCIE de Nevers .
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - AIMON [II] "Vaire-Vache" de Bourbon m (1099) LUCIE de Nevers, daughter of GUILLAUME [II] de Nevers Comte de Tonnerre & his wife ---.

zh.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers是Guillaume de Nevers II的女兒，於大約1083年出生。她和Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1116年7月15日在法國奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers是Guillaume de Nevers II的女儿，于大约1083年出生。她和Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1116年7月15日在法国奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Lucie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin. See Lucy . This has now largely replaced the older French form Luce .

en.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers was born about 1083 as the daughter of Guillaume de Nevers II. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon. She died on 15 July 1116, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers est née environ 1083, fille de Guillaume de Nevers II. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1116, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers wurde um 1083, als Tochter von Guillaume de Nevers II geboren. Sie hatte mit Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1116 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers è nata il circa 1083 come figlia di Guillaume de Nevers II. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon. Morì il 15 luglio 1116, nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucie Neversは約1083年にGuillaume de Nevers IIの娘として生まれた。彼女はAimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1116年7月15日にフランスアウバーグンアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers(은)는 대략 1083년 Guillaume de Nevers II의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1116년 7월 15일 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers nasceu aproximadamente 1083 filha de Guillaume de Nevers II. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1116, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, França, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers родилась около 1083 г. Её отца звали Guillaume de Nevers II. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon. Она умерла 15 июля 1116 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lucie Nevers nació aproximadamente 1083 como hija de Guillaume de Nevers II. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon. Murió el 15 de julio de 1116, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 34 años.
